ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gene's function */,
  "enzyme_code" TEXT /* Enzyme classification code */,
  "similar_gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a similar gene (if applicable) */,
  "similarity_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of similarity with similar gene */,
  "coverage_percentage" TEXT /* Coverage percentage of the gene's sequence */,
  "bit_score" REAL /* Bit score representing alignment quality */,
  "chromosome_number" TEXT /* Chromosome number where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand_orientation" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the gene (positive or negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_similar_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("similar_gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "similarity_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity metric entry */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original gene being compared */,
  "similarity_gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the similar gene */,
  "similarity_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of similarity between genes */,
  "coverage_percentage" TEXT /* Coverage percentage during comparison */,
  "bit_score" REAL /* Bit score for the similarity alignment */,
  "alignment_length" INTEGER /* Length of the alignment */,
  "mismatch_count" INTEGER /* Number of mismatches in the alignment */,
  "gap_open_count" INTEGER /* Number of gap opens in the alignment */,
  "gap_extension_count" INTEGER /* Number of gap extensions in the alignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similarity_metrics_similarity_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("similarity_gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similarity_metrics_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enzyme_classes" (
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enzyme class */,
  "enzyme_code" TEXT /* Code for the enzyme classification */,
  "classification_description" TEXT /* Description of the enzyme and its functions */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the enzyme class */,
  "subclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the enzyme subclass */,
  "subsubclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the enzyme sub-subclass */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enzyme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene that was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update made */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update occurred */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_updates_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the gene */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the gene was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being annotated */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., literature, database) */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression_data" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression record */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being expressed */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Level of gene expression (e.g., TPM, FPKM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_data_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
